text:
(German for mankind) https://twitter.com/Bunkamura_info/status/1743829833808019505 is a special organization that was put together to combat the Angels in the Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play.

Profile

The development of Evangelion dates back to before the establishment of MENSCH, a project that was being advanced with Kano as the chief executive. In addition to previous research on Sagata's Adam's Capsule, which was used in the project, development is proceeding based on knowledge gained from investigating craters that were created in the disaster area. Development was extremely difficult, including securing pilots, but after 11 years, Evangelion α, Evangelion β, Evangelion γ, and Evangelion δ were completed. Currently, four Evangelions are in operation, and each Unit is not the same, but each has its own type.

Etsuko Sakurai (Leader of Technology Development Department)

Soshi Tomori

Equipment Used

Evangelion Units

Evangelion α
Evangelion β
Evangelion δ
Evangelion γ

Trivia

Their logo is based on 's drawing, '. https://twitter.com/Bunkamura_info/status/1743829833808019505 
The logo features a quote from the ancient Greek philosopher : "THE FIRST AND BEST VICTORY IS TO CONQUER YOURSELF." Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.39 
The original idea for the logo was from the director Sidi Larbi Cherkaoui, the concept was to emulate the visual aspect of the NERV logo. https://twitter.com/tsuge_official/status/1657006970514341889
